name: inter_param_flow
description: None flows through a callee via the nullable_from_param summary path. wrap_value returns its input unchanged; when called with a Nullable arg the return is Nullable.
analysis_note: wrap_value: Param(val, annotation=Nullable). Return(FromVar(val)). With all-Unknown entry: base_return=Unknown. With val=Nullable: return Nullable → nullable_from_param[0]=True. process_input: text is Optional → Nullable. Assign(result, Call{wrap_value, [text]}) → apply_summary with [Nullable] → nullable_from_param[0]=True → result=Nullable. Consumer(result, Attribute) fires.
task: process_input() calls wrap_value() which passes its Optional[str] argument through unchanged. The return value can be None when text is None. Add a None check before calling result.strip().
